# Le 1901 - Luxury Apartment in Nancy

A premium stay in the heart of Nancy, combining bespoke comfort and historic Art Nouveau aesthetics.

## Contact
- **Brand name:** Le 1901
- **Location:** Charles III District, 54000 Nancy, France
- **Website:** https://le1901-nancy.fr/
- **Booking:** https://www.rock-in-share.com/fr/rentals/629899-le-1901-t3-hyper-centre-style-art-nouveau-ascenseur-et-parking-a-proximite-a-peripherie?adults=3&currency=EUR&rentals_search_id=ce3ae144-c11d-d036-8dfe-2bb978c7efb2

## Description
The apartment is located in the very centre of Nancy, within walking distance of Place Stanislas (6 min on foot). It offers high-end amenities on par with a hotel, combined with the privacy and independence of a self-contained rental.

### Key Amenities
- **Comfort:** Premium hotel-grade bed (160 cm), percale linens, heated floor and shower tray.
- **Technology:** High-speed Wi-Fi (fibre), OLED smart TV, smart speaker.
- **Kitchen:** Fully equipped (fridge, oven, dishwasher, Nespresso machine).
- **Style:** Decor inspired by the School of Nancy and Art Nouveau.

## Local Guide
- Central Market: 2 min walk
- Place Stanislas: 6 min walk
- Parc de la Pépinière: 8 min walk
- Nancy TGV Train Station: 10 min walk
